caption: A man with short brown hair is visible in a small picture-in-picture window in the bottom left corner of a screen recording. He is speaking and gesturing slightly as he explains a financial chart. The main screen displays a trading platform with a candlestick chart for "EURGBP (D1)". The chart includes a red horizontal line at "0.89338" and a green horizontal zone around "0.88417". To the left of the chart, a side panel features the "TICKMILL" logo and the German text "HANDELN SIE AN DEN FINANZMÄRKTEN MIT SICHERHEIT UND VERTRAUEN". This panel also lists features such as "FIX API" and "www.tickmill.com/de". As the video progresses, the man's facial expressions and head position shift as he continues his presentation, while the background trading interface and on-screen text remain static.
